docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $411.10 FILED BY BROOK FURNITURE RENTAL INC. AS TO DEFENDANT ROXAS MICHAEL AKA ROXAS MIKE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-15-1995 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT C
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT ROXAS MICHAEL AKA ROXAS MIKE

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BROOK FURNITURE RENTAL INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ROXAS MICHAEL AKA ROXAS MIKE $411.10 PRINCIPAL, $47.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $458.10 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT TO MICHAEL ROXAS MIKE RETURNED ATTEMPTED NOT KNOWN.
JUDGMENT ASSIGNED BY JUDGMENT CREDITOR BROOK FURNITURE RENTAL INC. ASSIGNED TO METROPOLITAN ADJUSTMENT BUREAU
